name: agent-terminal-sessions
description: Manage independent terminal sessions running interactive coding agents (Claude Code and others), surviving window reloads via tmux.

viewsWelcome.contents:
tmux was not found on PATH.
Agent Sessions requires tmux to persist sessions across window reloads.
[Check tmux path setting](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22agentSessions.tmuxPath%22)

agentSessions.agents.description: Available agents that can be launched as sessions. Edit via the "Configure Agents" gear icon in the Agent Sessions view for a friendlier UI.

id.description: Stable identifier for this agent definition.

label.description: Display name used as a fallback session label.

icon.description: Codicon id used in the session list (e.g. "terminal", "rocket"). Ignored when iconPath is set.

iconPath.description: Absolute path (or path relative to the workspace root, "~" allowed) to a custom icon image (svg/png/etc.) shown instead of the codicon.

cwd.description: Working directory. Defaults to the workspace root, else the home directory.

env.description: Additional environment variables for the agent process.

agentSessions.defaultAgentId.description: Id of the agent (from agentSessions.agents) launched by the toolbar "+" button and the New Agent Session command. Pick a specific agent type instead via the "New session" rows at the bottom of the session list. Also settable via the "Configure Agents" UI.

agentSessions.followTerminalTitle.description: Derive session labels from the agent's own terminal title (OSC 0/2). When disabled, sessions use a static "<label> N" name.

agentSessions.confirmKill.description: Ask for confirmation before killing a session.

agentSessions.pollIntervalMs.description: How often (in milliseconds) to poll tmux for background session state and title changes.

agentSessions.tmuxFocusEvents.description: Enable tmux's focus-events option for agent sessions, so agents running inside them (e.g. Claude Code) can detect whether the pane is focused. Applies only to this extension's own tmux server, not your ~/.tmux.conf.

agentSessions.tmuxMouse.title: Tmux Mouse Mode
agentSessions.tmuxMouse.description: Enable tmux's mouse option for agent sessions, so the mouse wheel scrolls the pane and agents running inside them (e.g. Claude Code) don't show a hint about it being off. When enabled, click-drag in the terminal is captured for tmux/app mouse reporting instead of text selection; hold Shift while dragging to select and copy text. Applies only to this extension's own tmux server, not your ~/.tmux.conf.

agentSessions.fontFamily.description: Font family for the terminal pane. When empty, inherits VS Code's terminal font (terminal.integrated.fontFamily), falling back to the editor font (editor.fontFamily), then "CaskaydiaCove Nerd Font Mono" if neither is set.

agentSessions.fontSize.description: Font size (in pixels) for the terminal pane. When 0, inherits VS Code's terminal font size (terminal.integrated.fontSize), falling back to the editor font size (editor.fontSize).
